summary: i18n System + Production Screen Testing Complete. Fixed critical bug (t is not defined in NewOrderModal). All i18n features verified for ES/EN translation switching. Production Screen shows 14 machine cards in 7-column grid with auto-refresh and fullscreen toggles.

issues: React hydration warnings (span inside tr/tbody) - cosmetic only, known from previous iterations
Missing DialogDescription for accessibility - console warnings but no functional impact
'+ Agregar campo adicional' text not translated (remains Spanish in English mode) - MINOR

passed_tests: FRONTEND: Language toggle button (data-testid='lang-toggle-btn') visible in header showing 'EN' or 'ES'
FRONTEND: Clicking language toggle switches all UI text between Spanish and English
FRONTEND: Language persists in localStorage key 'app_language'
FRONTEND: Language persists after page reload
FRONTEND: 'Nueva Orden' button text changes to 'New Order' in English
FRONTEND: 'Producción' button text changes to 'Production' in English
FRONTEND: 'Gantt' and 'PLAN' button labels work in both languages
FRONTEND: Activity Log modal title translates (REGISTRO DE ACTIVIDAD -> ACTIVITY LOG)
FRONTEND: Activity Log action labels translate correctly (Crear orden -> Create order, Registrar producción -> Register production)
FRONTEND: ProductionModal title translates (Registrar Producción -> Register Production)
FRONTEND: ProductionModal labels translate (Número de Orden -> Order Number, Cantidad Producida -> Quantity Produced)
FRONTEND: GanttView title translates (Vista Gantt -> Gantt View)
FRONTEND: GanttView legend labels translate (En progreso -> In progress, Completado -> Completed, Pendiente -> Pending)
FRONTEND: GanttView 'Hoy' button translates to 'Today'
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal title translates (Plan de Capacidad Productiva -> Production Capacity Plan)
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal summary cards translate (Máquinas Activas -> Active Machines, Total Producido -> Total Produced)
FRONTEND: CapacityPlanModal machine status labels translate (Sin actividad -> No activity, Disponible -> Available, Cargada -> Loaded, Sobrecargada -> Overloaded)
FRONTEND: 'Restante' column header changes to 'Remaining' in English
FRONTEND: New Order form labels translate (Número de Orden -> Order Number, Cliente -> Client, Prioridad -> Priority, Cantidad -> Quantity, Fecha de Entrega -> Due Date)
FRONTEND: Trash dialog title translates (Papelera de Reciclaje -> Recycle Bin)
FRONTEND: Production Screen (data-testid='production-screen') opens from header button (data-testid='production-screen-btn')
FRONTEND: Production Screen shows 14 machine cards in 7-column grid (data-testid='prod-machine-MAQUINA{N}')
FRONTEND: Production Screen has auto-refresh toggle (data-testid='auto-refresh-toggle')
FRONTEND: Production Screen has fullscreen toggle (data-testid='fullscreen-toggle')
FRONTEND: Production Screen shows summary stats (14/14 active machines, total produced, pending pieces)
FRONTEND: Production Screen machine cards show status colors (green/yellow/red/idle)
FRONTEND: Production Screen title translates (Monitor de Producción -> Production Monitor)

bugs_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: t is not defined - caused entire app to crash
bugs_fixed.fix: Added 'const { t } = useLang();' to NewOrderModal component

action_items: MINOR: Translate '+ Agregar campo adicional' text in New Order form to English
critical_code_review_comments: translations.js: Complete ES/EN translations object covering all components
LanguageContext.js: LanguageProvider with t(), lang, toggleLang - localStorage persistence works correctly
App.js: LanguageProvider wrapping entire app correctly
Dashboard.js: Fixed missing useLang() in NewOrderModal component
ProductionScreen.js: Full-screen production monitor with auto-refresh (30s interval) working
ProductionScreen.js: 7-column grid renders all 14 machine cards with status color coding

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All i18n and Production Screen features verified

seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n system fully implemented and tested. All components (Dashboard, ProductionModal, GanttView, CapacityPlanModal, ProductionScreen) support ES/EN translation via useLang() hook. Language persists in localStorage. Production Screen displays 14 machine cards in 7-column grid with auto-refresh every 30s and fullscreen toggle. The only remaining minor issue is the '+ Agregar campo adicional' text in New Order form that needs translation.
